title: justicia latior
intro: Justicia latior, also known as the wild poinsettia or Mexican firecracker, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant's leaves and flowers are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia latior include relief from fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
